query: SELECT receipt_no, status, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.payment_status')) as payment_status, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.remark')) as remark, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as principal_paid, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as bad_debt_amount, CAST(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount') AS DECIMAL(12,2)) as close_installment_amount FROM payment_transactions WHERE section = 'Boonphone' LIMIT 10
